name: meteo-forecast-chart
description: weather_forecast returns hourly/daily timeseries for a location. Hourly data includes {time, temperature_2m, relative_humidity_2m, precipitation, wind_speed_10m, weather_code}. Daily includes {time, temperature_2m_max, temperature_2m_min, precipitation_sum}. Use for line/bar charts over time.
data_shape: {hourly: {time: string[], temperature_2m: number[], precipitation: number[], wind_speed_10m: number[]}, daily: {time: string[], temperature_2m_max: number[], temperature_2m_min: number[], precipitation_sum: number[]}}

name: meteo-location-map
description: geocoding tool resolves place names to {latitude, longitude, name, country, elevation, timezone}. Combine with weather_forecast which requires lat/lng. Multiple locations can be plotted on a map.
data_shape: array of {latitude: number, longitude: number, name: string, country: string, elevation: number, timezone: string}

name: meteo-summary-kpi
description: weather_forecast current_weather returns {temperature, windspeed, winddirection, weathercode, time}. Use for stat cards showing current conditions at a glance.
data_shape: {current_weather: {temperature: number, windspeed: number, winddirection: number, weathercode: number, time: string}, latitude: number, longitude: number}
